name: nankai-business-review-skills
description: Agent skill stack for submitting to 《南开管理评论》 (Nankai Business Review, NBR) — the top Chinese business-school journal sponsored by Nankai University Business School (founded 1998 from 《国际经贸研究》; ISSN 1008-3448; CN 12-1288/F). Built for theory-building management research grounded in the China context: strategy, organizational behavior, HRM, marketing, corporate governance, innovation/entrepreneurship — via survey-SEM (mediation / moderation / moderated mediation / HLM), experiments, or multi-case / grounded-theory methods. Covers fit positioning, theory-gap articulation, mechanism-backed hypothesis development, measurement rigor (reliability, validity, common-method-bias), contextualized theory, discussion that advances a management theory, submission preflight, and R&R rebuttals — NOT econometric-identification advice.
